meaning: n.谷壳,糠,愚弄v.戏弄,开玩笑
examples: It isn't always easy to separate the wheat from the chaff.
They grew more and more cheerful, and finally began to chaff each other and insult passengers along the highway.
Sift out the wheat from the chaff.
So how to sort through the chaff and find Twitterers worthy of the hallowed follow button?
The new X prize is designed to winnow the genetic wheat from the chaff.
